verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Learning to lean, I'm learning to lean, I'm learning to lean on Jesus; I'm gaining more power than I've ever seen I'm learning to lean on Jesus.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sad, broken hearted, At an altar I knelt. I found peace that is so serene. And all that He asks Is a child like trust And a heart that is Learning to lean.
